hooks.command: input=$(cat); cmd=$(echo "$input" | jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""'); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'ssh oxygen-mvp'; then in_progress=$(grep -c '\[~\]' /Users/gordonwong/claude-projects/oxygen-mvp/TASKS.md 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$in_progress" -eq 0 ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "PreToolUse", "additionalContext": "TASK WARNING: You are about to run an EC2 command but there is no in-progress task ([~]) in TASKS.md. Create or mark a task [~] in TASKS.md before proceeding with EC2 work."}}'; else echo '{}'; fi; else echo '{}'; fi

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput": {"hookEventName": "Stop", "additionalContext": "LOGGING REMINDER: Before ending this session, verify LOG.md and TASKS.md are current. Log format: HH:MM ET timestamp. Check: (1) any completed tasks marked [x] in TASKS.md, (2) decisions/blockers added to LOG.md, (3) Current Status and Last Updated fields updated."}}'
